step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling, body proportions, cream waffle-knit robe and camisole strap, and the entire bedroom doorway scene including the hardwood floor, cream bench with folded white towel and ceramic mug, and softly-lit bathroom in the background — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product flat on her open left palm at hip level: her left arm relaxed at her side, elbow gently bent, palm facing up and open, the box resting flat across her open fingers with the front face angled toward the camera, her thumb resting lightly on top of the box to steady it in a relaxed casual cradle, not a presentation grip. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand. Her wrist angle, finger curl, and slight body posture may shift naturally to make the open-palm hold look real and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her left hand visibly cradles the product, her right hand continues to gently hold the edge of the doorframe. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color, only apply the scene's directional lighting on top, do not tint the white to match the warm cream palette. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft warm morning daylight from windows on either side, balanced diffuse wash, with a soft gentle shadow falling beneath the box on her palm.
